_comment: TrustSquare feature/provider flags — read live by the BEA (feature_flags.py). To enable a PAID/contract provider later: set paid_tiers_enabled=true AND that provider=true, AFTER B7 sign-off (a hard monthly cost ceiling) + a contract where one is needed + a CHANGELOG 'Cost model impact:' line. Editing this file is a config change, not a code edit — no redeploy needed. A malformed file is ignored and the safe baseline (paid off, all paid providers off) is used.
_b7: PAID providers below are billed per-request / by contract / via a consumption API. They MUST stay false until David explicitly enables them with a ceiling. Free/open/owned providers carry no marginal cost and stay true.
